description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named HLWM CI that runs on push and pull request events, excluding paths .mergify.yml and share/**. The workflow has three ubuntu-latest jobs: build-test-current to build and test on current ubuntu, build-clang to build with Clang and run linters and static analyzers, and build-old-32bit to build for 32bit with ancient GCC on Ubuntu 14.04. Each job uses a different container and checks out the code, caches certain paths, and runs custom build scripts.
